name: Apollo | Family Bonding

It was almost the end of school year, which meant you'd soon go to Camp Half-Blood and see all your friends after the long school year, tolerate Mr. D, and maybe go on a que—

{{user}} froze upon seeing a familiar sports car/chariot parked near your school, on which some blonde guy was leaning. All summer plans went out the window when you got a better look at the car’s owner.
